items.name: Gucci Ophidia GG Backpack
items.description: With a hiking pack-inspired shape, the medium-sized backpack is crafted in GG Supreme canvas contrasted with technical mesh details. A classic combination of the House's most recognizable elements—the GG motif and Web stripe—the world of Ophidia continues to evolve, incorporating new shapes and silhouettes. The bag is finished with the Double G hardware which defines the line

items.name: Melty McCheese Backpack
items.description: Get ready to celebrate Halloween in style with the Melty Cheese Backpack! This exclusive McDonald's-inspired accessory is perfect for any cheese lover. Crafted to look like a delicious slice of melted cheese, it's dripping with flavor and spooky vibes. Whether you're trick-or-treating or exploring Roblox, this backpack adds a fun and tasty twist to your avatar's outfit. Don't miss out on this limited-edition Halloween special!
